notes: Project Pages must not define public route architecture.
The workflow validates generated public data freshness, publication inventory, and site/dist before uploading the artifact.
Repository Shape Consolidation v0 makes site/dist the single generated static artifact uploaded by the workflow.
Workflow configuration does not prove a GitHub Actions deployment run succeeded.

Static Deployment Evidence / GitHub Pages Repair v0 records current-head deployment as unverified because gh is unavailable locally; prior committed evidence records a Pages configuration failure before artifact upload.
Custom Domain / Alternate Host Readiness v0 confirms this target remains project-path static hosting under /eureka/.
No Python backend, live probes, custom domain, secrets, or generator deployment is added by this target.
P56 static search integration publishes backend-unconfigured search_config.json and public_index_summary.json as static data only; no dynamic backend is deployed by Pages.
Custom domain use is future work.
DNS configuration and domain verification are not part of this slice.
Custom Domain / Alternate Host Readiness v0 adds readiness docs and validation only.
Routes must remain portable between /eureka/ and /.
This target is not deployment approval.
Live Backend Handoff Contract v0 reserves future /api/v1 route semantics before any hosted backend target becomes active.
Provider-neutral deployment config and operator approval must come later.
Live probes stay disabled by default until a separate gateway contract exists.
Public Search Static Handoff v0 does not configure or deploy this backend.
The only current URL is a localhost local-runtime hint, not public deployment evidence.
Hosted Public Search Wrapper v0 adds a deployable local/prototype wrapper and template files only.
Hosted search must remain unavailable until a later rehearsal/deployment milestone records approved configuration and evidence.
Live probes, downloads, installs, uploads, local paths, accounts, and telemetry remain disabled.
Static Site Search Integration v0 keeps hosted_backend_url null and hosted form submission disabled until operator deployment evidence exists.
